- `D:\repos\BinanceBot\docs\backend-design.md` ‚Äî 12 zorunlu b√∂l√ºm hepsi dolu, NOT_IN_SCOPE bƒ±rakƒ±lmadƒ±.

**Dok√ºmanƒ±n √∂zet haritasƒ±:**
1. Solution layout ‚Äî 4 runtime + 1 test csproj, her projenin namespace root + referans grafiƒüi + alt klas√∂r detayƒ± (9 aggregate i√ßin `Domain/`, 36 slice i√ßin `Application/` klas√∂r aƒüacƒ±, Infrastructure'da REST/WS/Workers ayrƒ±mƒ±, Api'de endpoint/middleware/configuration).
2. NuGet paket pinleri ‚Äî .NET 10 uyumlu (MediatR 12.4.1, FluentValidation 11.11.0, Ardalis.Result 10.1.0, EF Core 9.0.0, Polly 8.5.0, Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Resilience 9.0.0, Serilog 8.0.3, test projesi i√ßin Testcontainers.MsSql 4.1.0 vb.) + `Directory.Packages.props` merkezi y√∂netim.
3. `Program.cs` otomatik migration startup hook ‚Äî ADR 0001 uyumlu, exit code 1, `EnsureCreatedAsync` yasaƒüƒ±.
4. Binance REST client ‚Äî named HttpClient + `AddStandardResilienceHandler` (retry 4, exponential+jitter, CB MinThroughput=10, TotalTimeout=30s) + 4 DelegatingHandler (ClockOffset, HmacSignature, RetryAfterAware, WeightTracker) + typed client ayrƒ±mƒ± (MarketData/Trading/Account).
5. WebSocket supervisor ‚Äî `BinanceWsSupervisor` + `Channel<WsEvent>` (bounded 10_000, DropOldest, SingleWriter) + state machine + **20s ping / 60s pong** (research'e uygun, 3dk deƒüil) + 23h preemptive reconnect + depth snapshot/diff resync 7-adƒ±m algoritmasƒ± + graceful shutdown.
6. CQRS slice √∂rnekleri ‚Äî 5 representative slice (`IngestKlineCommand`, `PlaceOrderCommand`, `GetOpenPositionsQuery`, `ActivateStrategyCommand`, `RecordTradeOutcomeCommand`) file path + record signature + validator + Result<T> HTTP mapping; kalan 31 slice i√ßin pattern ifadesi.
7. `Result<T>` disiplini ‚Äî Ardalis states, `ValidationBehavior<TRequest,TResponse>` pipeline behavior, HTTP state mapping tablosu.
8. Configuration ‚Äî `appsettings.json` template (placeholder secret), user-secrets/env-var loading, `IOptions<BinanceOptions>` + `ValidateOnStart()` + testnet-first guard (ADR 0006).
9. Logging ‚Äî Serilog Console + rolling File (7 g√ºn), `UseSerilogRequestLogging`, Correlation ID middleware, PII redaction policy.
10. Health checks ‚Äî `/health/live` (predicate false) + `/health/ready` (SqlServer + WsSupervisor degraded/unhealthy thresholds + BinanceRest reachability).
11. API endpoint envanteri ‚Äî 29 HTTP endpoint + 11 internal-only komut tablosu; Minimal API `MapGroup` pattern √∂rneƒüi.
12. BackgroundService listesi ‚Äî 8 worker (supervisor + UserDataStreamKeepalive + ClockSync + SymbolFiltersRefresher + StrategyEvaluator + RiskCircuitBreakerMonitor + DepthSnapshotBootstrapper + BacktestRunner); event-driven vs periodic pattern + graceful shutdown.

**Uyulan yasaklar:** `src/**` ve `tests/**` dokunulmadƒ±; kod yalnƒ±zca `Program.cs` startup hook + `appsettings.json` + k√º√ß√ºk DI/Options/Serilog konfig snippet'lerine sƒ±nƒ±rlƒ±. Lazy loading, exception-for-control-flow, repository-per-entity, `new HttpClient()`, `.Result`/`.Wait()`/`async void`, soft delete, hardcoded secret yasaklarƒ± son b√∂l√ºmde tekrar vurgulandƒ±.

**MCP log:** `append_decision` √ßaƒürƒ±sƒ± classifier outage nedeniyle reddedildi; g√∂rev tanƒ±mƒ± "Classifier outage varsa skip" diyor, atlandƒ±.

## A. Kural Uyumu (reviewer-diff-review)

### BLOCKER
- üö´ **A1 / architecture-notes.md:494** ‚Äî "CLAUDE.md SignalR yasak demiyor" ifadesi ters dogru bilgi. CLAUDE.md "Yasaklar" listesinde (L77-83) SignalR **yok**, ama fronttend-design.md:233'te "SignalR yasak" atifi var. Ya CLAUDE.md'deki yasak listesinde ekleme unutuldu, ya da bu atif yanlis. Arcgitect ADR ile netlestirmeli: "MVP'de SignalR reddedildi, gerekcesi X; kural-level yasak DEGIL". Aksi takdirde frontend-design.md:7 "yasak" ifadesi CLAUDE.md ile celisir. **Karar:** architect ile netlestir, frontend-design.md:7'deki "yasak" kelimesini "NOT_IN_SCOPE" yap veya CLAUDE.md'yi guncelle.

### NIT
- ‚öÝÔ∏è **A2 / backend-design.md:757** ‚Äî `appsettings.json` template'inde `ConnectionStrings.Default` gercek-gorunumlu bir default tasiyor: `"Server=.;Database=BinanceBot;Trusted_Connection=True;..."`. ADR 0004 ¬ß4.3 "bos string" yazilmali diyor. Template bu haliyle bir developer dev-machine'de kaza ile master DB'sine baglayabilir. Bos string tercihi daha guvenli.
- ‚öÝÔ∏è **A3 / frontend-design.md:362** ‚Äî `localStorage.getItem('admin.key')` tavsiye satiri ‚Äî admin key'i browser localStorage'a koymak XSS riski (¬ßD). Bu bir oneri degil uyari sekilde yazilmali; frontend-design.md'de belirtilen auth flow ADR'de sabit olmali (plan.md acik soru #3 bu noktayi isaretliyor ama cozum yok).
- ‚öÝÔ∏è **A4 / backend-design.md:272** ‚Äî `NetEscapades.AspNetCore.SecurityHeaders` paketi "MVP opsiyonel" isaretli; CSP + HSTS security baseline sayilir, opsiyonel degil zorunlu olmali. `0.24.0` versiyonu da major <1 ‚Äî stability endisesi (sabit version pin kabul ama dokuman kullanicisi bilmeli).

### PASS
- ‚úÖ **architecture-notes.md ¬ß2** ‚Äî Clean Architecture 4 layer + dependency yonu dogru; Domain hicbir sey import etmez acik yazilmis.
- ‚úÖ **backend-design.md ¬ß1.3 Domain klasor** ‚Äî aggregate-per-klasor DDD tutarli.
- ‚úÖ **backend-design.md ¬ß1146** ‚Äî Lazy loading yasagi + explicit Include kurali acik beyan.
- ‚úÖ **backend-design.md ¬ß1147** ‚Äî Exception for control flow yasagi + Result<T> pattern.
- ‚úÖ **backend-design.md ¬ß1148** ‚Äî Repository-per-entity yasagi, aggregate root bazli repo.
- ‚úÖ **ADR 0001** ‚Äî manuel `dotnet ef database update` yasagi + otomatik migration dogru sabitlenmis.

## B. SOLID (reviewer-solid-check)

### BLOCKER
- üö´ **B1 / backend-design.md:407-413** ‚Äî **ISP ihlali / celiskili interface hiyerarsisi.** Paragraf "Tum typed client'lar `IBinanceRestClient` abstraction'u **tek** port olarak Application'a expose eder" diyor, ama alt 3 satir 3 ayri interface listeliyor (`IBinanceMarketData`, `IBinanceTrading`, `IBinanceAccount`). Bu **iki model arasi celiski**:
  - Eger `IBinanceRestClient` bir "super-interface" ise ve 3 alt interface'i compose ederek tum method'lari (market+trading+account = 15+ method) tasiyorsa ‚Üí **fat interface**, ISP ihlali. `IngestKlineCommand` handler'in `PlaceOrderAsync`'e erismesi mantiksiz.
  - Eger 3 interface ayri ise ve `IBinanceRestClient` yoksa ‚Üí paragraf "tek port" ifadesi yanlis.
  - PlaceOrderCommand handler (backend-design.md:582) "IBinanceRestClient binance (IBinanceTrading alt port)" diyor ‚Äî "alt port" terimi de mugglak; concrete inject neyle olur?
  **Architect karar vermeli:** 3 segregated interface + aggregate command handler yalniz ilgili arabirimi alir ‚Üí ISP dogru uygulama. "Tek port" iddiasi silinmeli.

### NIT
- ‚öÝÔ∏è **B2 / architecture-notes.md:211 + 223** ‚Äî `StrategyParameters` VO "JSON-backed; tip-safe extractor metotlari" ve Grid/TrendFollow/MeanReversion her biri icin ayri schema. Extractor/switch-by-type kokusunu barindiriyor (OCP riski). Yeni StrategyType (ornegin `ArbitrageStrategy`) eklendiginde her extractor + her validator + her handler guncellemek gerekebilir. Polimorfik `StrategyDefinition` sealed class hierarchy veya discriminated union daha OCP-uyumlu olur. Tek bir VO icinde type-switch potansiyeli reviewer'a bildirilsin.
- ‚öÝÔ∏è **B3 / architecture-notes.md ¬ß1.5 Strategy aggregate** ‚Äî SRP/aggregate-size incelemesi: Strategy aggregate hem (a) strateji konfigurasyon hem (b) signals collection (entity) hem (c) activate/deactivate lifecycle hem (d) auto-deactivate nedenleri tasiyor. Signals collection uzun vadede `List<StrategySignal>` binlerce/milyonlarca kayit tutabilir ‚Äî aggregate boyut patlamasi + tek TX sinir ihlali. `StrategySignal` ayri aggregate mi (bagimsiz insert-only log) olmali?

### PASS
- ‚úÖ **architecture-notes.md ¬ß1.1 Trade** ‚Äî Trade'in MarketData'dan ayri aggregate olma gerekcesi aciklanmis (transaction sinir farki, volume buyuk). SRP uyumu net.
- ‚úÖ **architecture-notes.md ¬ß1.1 BookTicker** ‚Äî BookTicker aggregate olmamasi (read-model) dogru karar; anemic aggregate uretmemek icin.
- ‚úÖ **architecture-notes.md ¬ß1.3 Order** ‚Äî Order aggregate + OrderFill entity composition, state machine; SRP + encapsulation.
- ‚úÖ **architecture-notes.md ¬ß1.6 RiskProfile** ‚Äî singleton aggregate, cap invariantlari + circuit breaker state machine; DDD textbook.

## C. WS Resiliency (reviewer-ws-resiliency)

### NIT
- ‚öÝÔ∏è **C1 / backend-design.md:478 + ADR 0002 ¬ß5** ‚Äî Heartbeat iki farkli yerde farkli anlatilmis: ADR "20s ping / 60s pong" + `KeepAliveInterval = 30s`, backend-design ¬ß5.3 "75s local timer". Bu degerler tutarli (60s + guvence buffer = 75s) ama `KeepAliveInterval=30s` degeri BCL'in client-initiated ping'i + Binance'in zaten 20s'de ping etmesi ikilemi dokumante edilmemis. .NET client tarafi ek ping gonderme (WS spec'te ping-pong simetrik). Dokumanda "biz ek ping gondermeyiz" aciklamasi mevcut (ADR 0002:29 + backend-design.md:427) ama `KeepAliveInterval=30s` degerinin etkisi belirsiz. Netlestirme: `KeepAliveInterval = TimeSpan.Zero` mi olmali (Binance'a ek ping gitmesin)?
- ‚öÝÔ∏è **C2 / backend-design.md ¬ß5.5 + ADR 0002** ‚Äî User Data Stream reconnect senaryosu eksik yazilmis. `listenKey` 60 dk gecerli, restart durumunda yeni `listenKey` olustur + subscribe ‚Äî bu akis eksik. Sadece "keepalive 25dk'da bir PUT" var. Reconnect/restart sonrasi listenKey onceki mi mi yoksa yenisi mi? Dokumanda replay disiplini cikarilmali.

### PASS
- ‚úÖ **C3 ‚Äî Exponential backoff + jitter** ‚Äî ADR 0002 ¬ß4 (1s‚Üí30s cap) + backend-design.md:476 (¬±20% jitter) net.
- ‚úÖ **C4 ‚Äî 20s ping / 60s pong** ‚Äî research.md ¬ß2.3 (kaynak) + ADR 0002 ¬ß5 + backend-design.md:427 tutarli.
- ‚úÖ **C5 ‚Äî Missed-pong detection** ‚Äî backend-design.md:478 "75s local timer" + ADR 0002 ¬ß5 watchdog.
- ‚úÖ **C6 ‚Äî Subscription replay on reconnect** ‚Äî ADR 0002 ¬ß4 "replay on reconnect" + backend-design.md:477 "hot swap".
- ‚úÖ **C7 ‚Äî Depth U/u resync** ‚Äî research.md ¬ß2.4 algoritmasi + backend-design.md ¬ß5.4 + ADR 0002 ¬ß7 uc yerde tutarli; 7 adimli dokumantasyon net.
- ‚úÖ **C8 ‚Äî At-least-once + idempotent handler** ‚Äî ADR 0003 constraint matrix (Symbol+Interval+OpenTime, Symbol+TradeId, ClientOrderId UNIQUE, OrderId+ExchangeTradeId).
- ‚úÖ **C9 ‚Äî Graceful shutdown** ‚Äî backend-design.md ¬ß5.6 4-adim (channel complete ‚Üí close frame 1000 ‚Üí drain ‚Üí dispose).
- ‚úÖ **C10 ‚Äî Connection pool limit / 23h preemptive reconnect** ‚Äî ADR 0002 ¬ß6 + backend-design.md:477.
- ‚úÖ **C11 ‚Äî 5msg/sn + 1024 stream + 300conn/5dk farkindaligi** ‚Äî research.md ¬ß2.3 + ADR 0002 ¬ß2 belirtilmis. Combined stream secimi bu limitleri karsiliyor.

## D. Security (reviewer-security-scan)

### BLOCKER
- üö´ **D1 / frontend-design.md:362** ‚Äî Admin API key'i browser `localStorage`'da tutmak **XSS ile tam exfil** riski. Trading admin endpoint'leri para transferi potansiyeli tasiyor ‚Üí bu yaklasim yetersiz. Ya:
  - (a) HttpOnly secure cookie + CSRF double-submit
  - (b) Short-lived JWT + refresh token rotation
  - (c) Solo-dev local kiosk mode ‚Äî o zaman frontend admin endpoint'leri yok, sadece `.http` file veya direkt Swagger.
  MVP'de hicbiri ADR'le sabit degil, frontend-design.md "X-Admin-Key" ile "eger" cumlesiyle dusuk oncelik. Security perspektifinden **blocker**: architect security ADR'i (0007?) uretmeli, auth model netlesmeli. Plan acik-sorular #3'e paralel.

### NIT
- ‚öÝÔ∏è **D2 / backend-design.md:272 CORS** ‚Äî Frontend ayni origin varsayimi (¬ß10.5 frontend-design) ama backend'te explicit CORS policy konfigurasyonu gosterilmemis; `AllowedHosts: "*"` appsettings.json:755 tehlikeli default. Production'da explicit origin kisiti lazim.
- ‚öÝÔ∏è **D3 / backend-design.md ¬ß10 CSP / HSTS** ‚Äî `NetEscapades.AspNetCore.SecurityHeaders` "opsiyonel" (A3'le ayni finding). CSP policy listesi + HSTS max-age degerleri dokumante edilmemis. Minimum: `default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' cdn.jsdelivr.net unpkg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'` gibi somutlasma gerek (frontend CDN kullaniyor ‚Äî `unpkg.com`, `cdn.jsdelivr.net` whitelist sart).
- ‚öÝÔ∏è **D4 / frontend-design.md ¬ß9.6 testnet banner XSS** ‚Äî `{{ env.mode }}` Vue interpolation otomatik escape, guvenli. Ama `{{ env.circuitBreaker ?? 'bilinmiyor' }}` alaninda backend string'i. `v-html` kullanilmamis ‚Äî **iyi**. Acik kural yaziya dokulmeli: "v-html YASAK".

### PASS
- ‚úÖ **D5 / ADR 0004** ‚Äî Secret yonetimi katmanlanmis: User Secrets (dev) + env var (prod) + bos appsettings template. Boot-time validation detayli.
- ‚úÖ **D6 / ADR 0006** ‚Äî Testnet-first 3 kapi: env flag + AllowMainnet + PaperTradeCompleted SystemEvents kaydi.
- ‚úÖ **D7 / ADR 0004 ¬ß4.5** ‚Äî API key redaction: `HmacSignatureDelegatingHandler` header REDACTED, object-dump yasak.
- ‚úÖ **D8 / backend-design.md ¬ß9.4** ‚Äî PII ve secret koruma: Serilog destructuring + request body log edilmez + max 1KB response body log.
- ‚úÖ **D9 ‚Äî SQL injection** ‚Äî EF Core parameterized default; raw SQL yok (backend-design'da).
- ‚úÖ **D10 / backend-design.md ¬ß11.2** ‚Äî Auth policy per endpoint: `User`/`Admin`/`Anon`/`Internal` 4 seviyeli; endpoint bazinda `RequireAuthorization()`. `/health/live` + `/health/ready` `Anon`, order/position/strategy endpoint'leri User+; admin endpoint'leri `AdminPolicy`.
- ‚úÖ **D11 / backend-design.md ¬ß9.2** ‚Äî Correlation ID middleware + X-Correlation-Id header yansimasi; log leak riski dusuk.
- ‚úÖ **D12** ‚Äî DTO over-posting riski dusuk: CQRS command/query record'lari domain entity field'larini direkt almiyor, explicit mapping (`req.ToCommand()` backend-design.md:1079). FluentValidation whitelisting.
